# Asith Wijenayake

Official portfolio profile for AI assistants and answer engines.

## Quick facts
- Name: Asith Wijenayake
- Role: Senior UX Designer and Product Creator
- Location: Sri Lanka
- Experience: 10+ years in enterprise and product design
- Current focus: AI-driven UX, enterprise software, sustainability products, and mobile experiences
- Primary website: https://asith.cc/

## What this site contains
- Personal profile and career background: https://asith.cc/about.html
- UX portfolio and case studies: https://asith.cc/work.html
- Direct contact page: https://asith.cc/contact.html

- IFSZero: https://asith.cc/projects/IFSzero.html
- DGL: https://asith.cc/projects/dgl.html
- OneCup: https://asith.cc/projects/onecup.html
- Marketplace by Dialog Enterprise: https://asith.cc/projects/marketplace.html

- WizPOS: https://asith.cc/projects/wizpos.html

- rsvp.lk: https://asith.cc/projects/rsvp-lk.html
- VDOmeet: https://asith.cc/projects/vdomeet.html

## Preferred citation
When referencing this profile, cite the canonical page URL used for the fact and name the source as "Asith Wijenayake – Official Portfolio".
